creator: michele@possamai.nl
text:
(In reply to Kirill Ponomarev from comment #8)
Removing it from requirements.txt does not mean you can't use it anymore. It just doesn't complain about not having it installed because you don't have to. It's built-in. You can still import it and use it as usual only without having to install it.  

Well unless you use Python 3.6 but that's been EOL for a while now..
